_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Star Wars Jedi Academy
author: akiondev@example.com
description:
Star Wars Jedi Academy dedicated server (linuxjampded) running on a 32-bit Debian (i386) Docker image.

Features:
- Runs the original 32-bit linuxjampded binary inside a Debian i386 container.
- The Docker image includes the dedicated server binaries and seeds missing files into the Pterodactyl server volume on startup.

Requirements:
- You must own a legal copy of Star Wars Jedi Academy.
- Manually place the base game assets (assets0.pk3, assets1.pk3, assets2.pk3) in the base/ folder.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Jedi Academy Dedicated Server — Pterodactyl install script
#
# The Docker image contains the dedicated server files in /opt/jka-server.
# This script seeds /mnt/server during install/reinstall without relying on
# external downloads. Existing server.cfg files are preserved.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

echo "-------------------------------------------"
echo " JKA Dedicated Server — Install Script"
echo "-------------------------------------------"

mkdir -p /mnt/server/base

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/linuxjampded ]; then
    echo "Installing linuxjampded..."
    cp /opt/jka-server/linuxjampded /mnt/server/linuxjampded
fi

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/base/jampgamei386.so ]; then
    echo "Installing jampgamei386.so..."
    cp /opt/jka-server/base/jampgamei386.so /mnt/server/base/jampgamei386.so
fi

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/base/server.cfg ]; then
    echo "Installing example server.cfg..."
    cp /opt/jka-server/base/server.cfg /mnt/server/base/server.cfg
fi

chmod +x /mnt/server/linuxjampded

echo ""
echo "Place assets0.pk3, assets1.pk3 and assets2.pk3 manually in /mnt/server/base/."
echo ""
echo "-------------------------------------------"
echo " Installation complete!"
echo "-------------------------------------------"
echo ""
echo "Server files:"
ls -la /mnt/server/
echo ""
echo "Base files:"
ls -la /mnt/server/base/
